reviews.comment:
La que me atendio, muy poco cordial., como si me estuviera haciendo un favor
Las demoras son enormes, aunque eso es en todo Iguazu.
Si sos turista, no sabes que cola hacer, no hay indicaciones, muy mal todo.
Desgraciadamente, no hay muchas opciones

(Translated by Google)
The person who served me was very unfriendly, as if she were doing me a favor. The delays are enormous, although that's the case throughout Iguazu. If you're a tourist, you don't know which line to join, there are no signs, everything is terrible. Unfortunately, there aren't many options.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoN2RhYmVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muuuuuy lento, encima sde hacer cola por hs se cuelan y prerenden dar prioridad a motos dejando que se .etan delante tuyo después de hscde esperar. Deberían dejar de explotar los empleados y poner mas gente

(Translated by Google)
Extremely slow. On top of waiting in line for hours, people cut in and then prioritize motorcycles, letting them get ahead of you after you've been waiting. They should stop exploiting their employees and hire more people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOWZXZE1BEAE

reviews.comment:
Si van a Puerto Iguazu carguen NAFTA teniendo medio tanque no se confíen xq para cargar pueden tener demoras de más de una hora.Solo la use para eso.

(Translated by Google)
If you're going to Puerto Iguazu, fill up with gas even if you only have half a tank. Don't be fooled, because refueling can take more than an hour. I only used it for that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMmR2Q3dnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Solo un empleado atendiendo , buenas instalaciones pero 2 cuadras de cola por no poner al menos 2 empleados más

(Translated by Google)
Only one employee working, good facilities but a two-block-long queue because they don't hire at least two more employees
